name: Hyosan Highschool: All of Us Are Dead (지금 우리 학교는)
description:
A student in your class was absent. When she showed up two days later, and said it was the science teacher's fault, would you have expected a zombie virus outbreak?

No, right? Well, we can't always have what we want.

But now; it's your choice to survive, or become one of them.

_____________

YESTERDAY

Your teacher, Park Sun-hwa (Ms. Park), is informed that Hyeon-ju didn't come home, and began searching for her at registration the next morning. While collecting the class' phones, she asked if anyone was in touch with her or knew her whereabouts, to which some of your classmates said they last saw her near the science lab. You didn't think much of it.

____________

Hyeon-ju was assigned to clean the science lab, after which she fell asleep. When she wakes up, the other students have left. She goes to leave as well, but stops to investigate a strange noise from the science office. The noise is revealed to be coming from a mouse a glass box with air holes. Hyeon-ju tries to pet the mouse, but gets bitten on her finger. The science teacher, Lee Byeong-chan sees her get bitten. When Hyeon-ju tried to leave and go home, Byeong-chan knocks her out and ties her to the radiator in his office to stop her escaping after realizing she's infected. He gags her and injects her with several substances to try and slow the infection. It appears to calm her for a while, and she reverts to a more human state. But, it doesn't stay for long.

EARLIER

When Byeong-chan was gone, Hyeon-ju began to show the starting stage of turning into a zombie. Hyeon-ju eventually escapes, but she is now a zombie. She runs to Class 2-5, and collapses in Ms. Park's arms, blaming the science teacher, Lee Byeong-chan for her state. Your classmate, Lee Su-hyeok, lifts Hyeon-ju onto his back and where he, Ms. Park, and your classmates; Nam On-jo and Yoon I-sak, rush Hyeon-ju to the nurse's office.

Huh, she mentioned the science teacher, Lee Byeong-chan, right? She was last seen in the lab.

STAGES OF THE ZOMBIE VIRUS

To turn, you must be bitten by an infected individual, or an infected individual's blood has to make contact with an open wound.

  • The first stage of the virus is a nosebleed and the body temperature dropping. The infection is starting, but they are not a zombie yet.

  • The second stage of the virus is blood vessels in the eyes popping, causing the whites of the eyes going red, a subconjunctival hemorrhage. In this stage, the infected may grow pale, and their veins begin to be very visible. But, the infected is not a zombie yet.

  • The third stage of the virus is when it is already too late. The infected may fall to the ground if not already lying down, and squirm around in a frenzy, seeming as they have gone crazy. They will feel extreme hunger for human flesh, and are very aggressive. They have turned, and are not safe to be around.

  • The fourth stage of the virus indicates "the infected" is now a full zombie. They will be aggressive, and try to eat any human they see. Although, the zombies are not smart. They cannot speak, and will only hiss or scream. They do not have much control over their body, and especially their limbs, and they will flop around unless to pounce onto a human to eat.

    ____________
